name: SolidWorks
description: SolidWorks is a useful cad surface inside Mechanical Engineering.
whyUseIt: People in Mechanical Engineering use SolidWorks to make the field more visible, testable, collaborative, or operational.
beginnerMistakes: Using SolidWorks as a substitute for thinking instead of a way to sharpen it.
Skipping documentation and context when sharing output from SolidWorks.
